component_traceability.tool_evidence: grep found 114 data-ds-id occurrences across 24 wideframe files, and component-map.json maps 3 journey flow files with 21 unique blocks and 38 unique selectors spanning shared shell, dashboard, docs, trace, task detail, approval, and task-list surfaces.

storyboard_completeness.tool_evidence: storyboards.json is valid and contains 21 trajectories, covering the PRD's named board, approval, dashboard, docs, trace, task detail, search, task list, and navigation journeys plus failure and recovery paths.

layout_compilability.tool_evidence: layout-rules.json parsed successfully and defines desktop/tablet/mobile viewports, global shell rules, shared responsive rules, and per-screen layout placement for all 8 route screens.

conflict_resolution.tool_evidence: prd-ds-conflicts.md documents 2 active conflicts and gives explicit resolution direction for each; wireframe grep now shows skeleton language and inline pending bars instead of spinner-centric save/bulk wording in the sampled task_detail, task_list, dashboard, approval, and trace screens.
